Even considering the unavoidable life-or-death duel requests, the magicians were undoubtedly valuable talents.
But why should one go there to work themselves to death under the pretense of responsibility?

cause_effect: Or perhaps she coveted my power because Im a constellation.
The constellation, who until a few days ago was nailed to a cross and drained of magic for hundreds of years, gazed out the window with a shadowed look.
Thus, some of the spiders who had originally sworn allegiance to the Magic Tower, then to me, switched their loyalty to the alliance.
Someone who knew they could die at any moment and therefore didnt put on airs or feel regret anymore.
